summary: Iteration 32: Code audit remediation verification complete. All 10 audit items verified through code review and UI testing. Password reset, email verification, real-time error handling, null guards, input validation, CSP headers, and production-safe logging all implemented correctly. Demo login flows working. 29/29 Vitest unit tests pass.

item_1_password_reset.login_page: Forgot password? link visible. Without email → error toast 'Enter your email'. With email → success toast 'Reset email sent'
item_1_password_reset.profile_page: Reset Password button visible and triggers sendPasswordResetEmail via Firebase

item_2_email_verification.description: Registration calls sendEmailVerification(fbUser) and shows toast 'A verification email has been sent'

item_3_realtime_error_handling.useRealtimeNotifications: Error callback with logger.error and toast 'Notification sync lost'
item_3_realtime_error_handling.useRealtimeMessages: Error callback with logger.error and toast 'Message sync lost'

item_5_stale_data_on_error.description: useDataFetching catch block clears all state arrays on initial load failure

item_6_vite_error_overlay.description: Debug scripts only injected when isDev is true (NODE_ENV !== 'production')

item_7_input_validation.AddGameDialog: Payment validation 0-10000, time format regex validation
item_7_input_validation.Messages: Content max 5000 chars, subject max 200 chars

item_10_production_logger.console_error_count: Only 2 remain in main.jsx (both DEV-guarded or fatal)

ui_test_results.demo_manager_login: PASS — Click 'Try Demo Account' → 'Log in as Manager' → navigates to /manager. Dashboard loads with tournaments, tabs visible
ui_test_results.demo_referee_login: PASS — Click 'Try Demo Account' → 'Log in as Referee' → navigates to /dashboard. Welcome message, stats cards visible
ui_test_results.forgot_password_no_email: PASS — Shows error toast 'Enter your email'
ui_test_results.forgot_password_with_email: PASS — Shows success toast 'Reset email sent'
ui_test_results.profile_reset_password: PASS — Button visible, click triggers toast 'Reset email sent'
ui_test_results.messages_page: PASS — Inbox loads, compose button works, recipient dropdown populated

success_rate.backend: N/A (100% Firebase Firestore - no traditional backend)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 10 audit items verified, 29/29 unit tests pass, all UI flows working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 all green. All 10 code audit remediation items verified: (1) Password reset on Login and Profile pages, (2) Email verification on registration, (3) Real-time listener error handling with toasts, (4) Null guard in handleForward, (5) Stale data clearing on fetch error, (6) Vite error overlay dev-only, (7) Input validation for payment/time/message length, (8) Firestore rules for payment and rating bounds, (9) CSP headers in firebase.json, (10) Production-safe logger. All demo login flows working. 29/29 Vitest tests pass.
rca_of_issues: N/A — No bugs found. All audit items implemented correctly.
